name: OLED 0.96寸显示屏
init_code:
from machine import Pin, SoftI2C
import ssd1306
i2c = SoftI2C(scl=Pin(2), sda=Pin(1))
oled = ssd1306.SSD1306_I2C(128, 64, i2c)

name: DHT11温湿度传感器
init_code:
import dht
from machine import Pin
sensor = dht.DHT11(Pin(4))

name: HC-SR04超声波传感器
RGB全彩LED
init_code:
from machine import Pin, PWM
r = PWM(Pin(12), freq=1000)
g = PWM(Pin(13), freq=1000)
b = PWM(Pin(14), freq=1000)

name: 光敏电阻
init_code:
from machine import Pin, ADC
adc = ADC(Pin(8))
adc.atten(ADC.ATTN_11DB)

name: SG90舵机
init_code:
from machine import Pin, PWM
servo = PWM(Pin(17), freq=50)

name: 直流电机风扇
init_code:
from machine import Pin
motor_in1 = Pin(18, Pin.OUT)
motor_in2 = Pin(19, Pin.OUT)

name: 蜂鸣器
init_code:
from machine import Pin, PWM
buzzer = PWM(Pin(20), freq=1000)

name: PIR人体红外传感器
init_code:
from machine import Pin
pir = Pin(7, Pin.IN)

name: 大按键
init_code:
from machine import Pin
btn = Pin(15, Pin.IN, Pin.PULL_UP)
